plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-425 RP13.P09.M10.S04 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-425 implements descriptor-only coverage of the final RP13 closeout handoff slice: the single remaining M10 Closeout And Next Handoff row as one descriptor-only section over 1 planned row, closing the RP13 Payments AR Accounting Export descriptor program and handing off to RP14.P00.M00.S01 with Hermes evidence (H13), Claude review packet (C13), and CP00-426 handoff, without opening payments, payment matching, AR aging, or journal entry runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-425 is a descriptor-only closeout/handoff pack for the final RP13 slice (RP13.P09.M10.S04, 1 unit, risk A, security_audit "Audit completeness questions" / "Closeout And Next Handoff"). Independent read-only inspection confirms the pack-level posture is supported: production_ready is false / runtime_ready false / implementation_layer descriptor — the pack does NOT overclaim production or enterprise trust. Plan, manifest, contract current_pack, registry binding (PAYMENTS_CORE_CP425_PACK_BINDING), requirements, generated descriptor, tests, and the rp13 validator all agree on scope with no drift; the validator's deepEqual checks tie the contract p09_closeout_handoff_slice_descriptor, cp425_requirements, and cp425_no_write_attestation to code-generated values, so silent divergence would fail. Descriptor-only/no-write boundaries hold: all dispatch/write/runtime/real-data flags are false in both code (service.js freezeCp425Result + NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION) and the contract projection, and grep of the three changed src files found no fs/child_process/fetch/db/write patterns. Authority boundary is preserved everywhere — claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, enterprise trust closed outside this receipt — keeping Claude a read-only reviewer, not final approver. Hermes is used only for the deterministic evidence packet/receipt (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false). CP178+ review-hardening evidence is intact: auth preflight passed with non-empty valid JSON, tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob (forbidden_tools_present=false), and invalid_review_blockers reject auth failures, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing fields. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, which is expected at this read_only_claude_run step of the hardening sequence. One P3 informational note on a cosmetic scope-file labeling overlap that the authoritative manifest already resolves. No P0/P1/P2 findings; pack and goal closeout are not blocked by this review.

findings.title: changed-file-scope dual-classifies the pack's own docs dir as both active-pack and unrelated
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-425/ and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md appear in both untracked_implementation_files (lines 130-133) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 135-145). docs/closeout-packs/cp00-425/ holds this pack's required artifacts (manifest.json, command-evidence.json), so it is an active-pack implementation directory and cannot also be an unrelated preserved file; the dual label is internally contradictory review evidence. Impact is cosmetic only: the authoritative manifest worktree_transition_policy.unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (docs/closeout-packs/cp00-425/manifest.json:191) correctly excludes the pack dir and new-session-handoff.md, so pack boundaries, scope, and the descriptor-only production_ready posture are unaffected.
findings.recommendation: In the changed-file-scope generator, subtract active-pack implementation paths (including the pack's own docs/closeout-packs/<pack_id>/ directory) from unrelated_dirty_files_preserved so a path is classified in exactly one bucket, keeping review evidence non-contradictory.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking informational. Authoritative manifest resolves the classification correctly; no effect on pack closeout, scope integrity, or boundary claims.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-425 payments core p09 closeout handoff slice descriptor pack
